chunks.text: Indian Stock Market Indices: SENSEX — BSE index of 30 large-cap stocks. NIFTY 50 — NSE index of 50 large-cap stocks. NIFTY Next 50 — next 50 large caps. NIFTY Midcap 150, Smallcap 250. Sectoral: NIFTY Bank, IT, Pharma, FMCG, Auto. Market cap classification: Large cap > ₹20,000 Cr, Mid cap ₹5,000-20,000 Cr, Small cap < ₹5,000 Cr. Trading hours: 9:15 AM to 3:30 PM, Monday-Friday. Pre-open session: 9:00-9:15 AM.

Inflation in India: CPI (Consumer Price Index) — RBI target 4% (±2% band). WPI (Wholesale Price Index) — tracks wholesale prices. CPI components: Food & beverages 45.86%, Housing 10.07%, Fuel 6.84%, Miscellaneous 28.32%. Historical average: 5-7% per year. Effect on investments: FD rate must beat inflation for real returns. Real return = nominal return - inflation. RBI adjusts repo rate to control inflation. High inflation → RBI raises rates → loans costlier.

SEBI (Securities & Exchange Board of India) Key Rules: Mutual fund expense ratio cap: 1.05% (direct), 1.80% (regular) for equity. No entry load. Exit load: max 1% (first year). KYC mandatory for investing. Insider trading prohibited — SEBI LODR regulations. Mutual fund SIP minimum: ₹100 (AMFI mandate from 2024). Nominee mandatory for demat accounts. ASBA (Application Supported by Blocked Amount) for IPO applications — no advance payment.

Union Budget 2024-25 Key Finance Highlights: LTCG tax increased: 10% to 12.5% (equity, >1 year). STCG increased: 15% to 20% (equity, <1 year). LTCG exemption limit: ₹1,25,000 (up from ₹1,00,000). STT on F&O increased. Capital gains indexation benefit removed for real estate (flat 12.5% without indexation). Standard deduction increased ₹50,000 to ₹75,000 (new regime). NPS employer deduction: 10% to 14% of salary. Angel tax abolished for all investors.
